findings.issue: Project-knowledge link uses text `project.md` but points to `.claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md` ([project.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md)). The repo has no project.md (it is overview.md). The link text is misleading.
findings.fix: Rename the link text to match the target file: [overview.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md). Tasks 01, 02, 05 already do this correctly.

findings.issue: Project-knowledge link uses text `project.md` but points to `.claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md`. Same mislabel as task 03.
findings.fix: Use [overview.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md) to match the actual filename.

findings.issue: `verify:` value is `bash — go test ./internal/query/... ./internal/stat/...` — the command is embedded in the value rather than placed in a trailing comment as the template illustrates (`verify: bash  # ...`). It is still a valid string, but the form is inconsistent with tasks 01/02/03/05 which use `verify: bash` + comment.
findings.fix: Normalize to `verify: bash` with the command in a trailing comment, matching the other tasks in the batch.

findings.issue: `verify: bash` carries the command in an inline comment (`# go test ./internal/pretty/...`). Acceptable, but note for consistency the verify-comment phrasing differs slightly across tasks. No functional impact.
findings.fix: Optional: align the verify comment style across the batch; not blocking.
